channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping and general rubbish, 17th April
item.description:
Fly tipping and general rubbish all along the bank. You said previously this would be a complex job and you are monitoring it and that you wouldn't be doing it promptly unlike previous problems you have resolved. How long have you monitored this long standing eye sore for? And when will you decide to resolve a job that needs doing soon please?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish, 17th April
item.description:
Lots of bags of rubbish dumped in council owned alleyway Opposite 179 consort rd Please remove asap as rats & foxes seen on rubbish near flats

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 189, Consort Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All the way down the left side of the road (if facing towards Hampstead Heath), 17th April
item.description:
The street name sign and all parking restriction signs on the left hand of the street have been spray painted with blue paint. The signs are not visible at all.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Albans Road, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent Safety Concern – Dead Branches on Council Tree, 17th April
item.description:
The tree located beside the footpath at 134 Lullingstone Crescent has several dead branches that appear at risk of falling. As this footpath is regularly used by school children and other pedestrians, I am concerned that the branches could fall at any time and cause injury. Could you please arrange for the tree to be inspected and any necessary maintenance carried out as soon as possible?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 127, Lullingstone Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Posts missing on bike lane, 17th April
item.description:
Bike lane going towards Wood Green has numerous missing plastic posts. This leaves just the sockets which are easy to hit as a cyclist. If you are going to have bike lanes make them safe, eh?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa left on 4th floor, 17th April
item.description:
I sofa has been left outside my apartment since my neighbour moved out. I reported this on Tuesday. On Wednesday, I had a message saying it had been resolved, but it's still there! See photo and date stamp. Please, can this be removed? Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nelson Square, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 17th April
item.description:
Fly tip overnight, blocking half of carriageway used by lorries.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bazalgette Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sheldon road, 17th April
item.description:
Please sweep at the Anson end of Sheldon
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anson Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pile of commercial waste dumped, 17th April
item.description:
This has been here all week. Clearly left in the wrong location for collection. The business that left it here needs to be enforced against

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large double fridge / freezer dumped on pavement between no.2 Merrow Street and no.1 Clarence House, 17th April
item.description:
Fridge freezer dumped on pavement. Hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Merrow Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle obstruction on the pavement, 17th April
item.description:
Large pick-up parking on the pavement and obstructing the pathway, people and children must often enter the road to pass by in order to reach bus stop. Very dangerous situation.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastway, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on the pavement., 17th April
item.description:
Large van parking on the pavement and obstructing the pathway, people and children must often enter the road to pass by in order to reach bus stop. Very dangerous situation.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastway, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 17th April
item.description:
Neighbours at no.9 have fly tipped their house and garden rubbish onto the street again

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned damaged car, on red lines, 17th April
item.description:
Abandoned vehicle, both drivers and passenger side windows open, smashed front left corner panel, looks as if they’ve been stolen

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 208 Dunstans Road, 17th April
item.description:
Dog waste
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 216, Dunstan's Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubble spilled on shooters Hill outside school crossing, 17th April
item.description:
Breaking on hill compromised outside school crossing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin full and spilt on pavement, 17th April
item.description:
Fox or someone has emptied it all on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forest Hill Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The whole of Hanley Road is in a terrible state and needs resurfacing., 17th April
item.description:
Buses that go down Hanley Road bump and rock all over the place. I was on one recently that made such a bang as it went over a pothole that it broke down and had to stop.. The state of the road is terrible. Some resurfacing has been done around the corner at bus stop CS on Stroud green Road which was just as bad, but Hanley road now needs some urgent attention.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 72, Hanley Road, Finsbury Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overfilling bin with litter on the ground, 17th April
item.description:
As per title

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox - Please remove urgently. (What3words location: ///acid.oppose.wallet), 17th April
item.description:
Previous raised under FixMyStreet ref: 9301855. The dead fox which was outside of the school has now been covered and moved to the verge by a member of the public so this issue was not been 'fix' as noted by Greenwich Council on the original raised case. NEW WHAT3WORD LOCATION of the dead fox is: ///acid.oppose.wallet. The attached photo with the yellow marking clearly shows where the fox is now located which is now wrapped in a black bag. Please move urgently.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
